title: %Error: Internal Error: ...v:60: ../V3SymTable.h:60: Inserting two symbols with same name: v__DOT__...
body:
---


Author Name: **Alex Solomatnikov**
Original Redmine Issue: 498 from https://www.veripool.org
Original Date: 2012-04-27
Original Assignee: Wilson Snyder (@wsnyder)

---

The error is on the following line:

```
inout [8-1:0] read_write_data_io;

```

which is connected to 1 of 2 optional submodules:

```
generate
if (FAST_SIM_MODEL)
begin

         dqs2_abstract dqs2_inst (
...
                 .read_write_data_io( read_write_data_io),
...
end
else 
begin

         dqs2 dqs2_inst (
...
                 .read_write_data_io( read_write_data_io),

```

Full error message:

```
%Error: Internal Error: ddr3_ctlr_m0_q11_1sp2_p0_altdqdqs.v:60: ../V3SymTable.h:60: Inserting two symbols with same name: v__DOT__ddr3_ctlr_m0_q11_1sp2_inst__DOT__p0__DOT__umemphy__DOT__uio_pads__DOT____Vcellinp__ubidir_dq_dqs__read_write_data_io

```
